---
title: "Analyze Census"
author: "Michael F. Nelson"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
require(data.table)
require(here)
require(ggplot2)
```


```{r}
dat_5k1 = fread(here("model_runs", "out", "5k_species_census1.txt"), header = F)
dat_5k2 = fread(here("model_runs", "out", "5k_species_census2.txt"), header = F)
names(dat_5k1)[1] = "step"
names(dat_5k2)[1] = "step"


apply(dat_5k1[, -1], 1, function(x) sum(x > 0))
dat_5k2[, n_extant := apply(dat_5k2[, -1], 1, function(x) sum(x > 0))]

ggplot(dat_5k2) +
  geom_line(aes(x = step, y = log(n_extant)))

```
